title: 2015 Chunjie Dongman Da Lianhuan
synopsis:
The Animation Park, inhabited by the twelve zodiac animals, is now under the management of Le Yangyang. In the spirit of sharing with the world, Le Yangyang seeks the help of his generals to organize a grand Spring Festival gala. However, upon arriving at the park, he finds it wreaked havoc by the mischievous Nian beast. Meanwhile, the general's grandfather, the Old General, sees the Nian beast passing by and senses something amiss. In the ensuing chase, the animated characters travel through various animated worlds. During this time, the Nian beast realizes its mistake, and the characters forgive and forget. They learn the values ​​of fairness, integrity, friendliness, harmony, civility, care, and the rule of law, working together to overcome the difficulties and return to the Animation Park to celebrate the New Year.

(Source: Douban, translated)

title: Shengsi Huifang
synopsis:
Young man Wei Sisi worked hard to support himself after losing all his memories. One day in an accident, he somehow obtained an ability with which he could see the memories of the dead. A series of events coming right after it made him aware that he had been involved into a well-designed conspiracy. His past was also gradually uncovered...

(Source: Tencent Animation)

title: Hello! Pu Xingren
synopsis:
Alien Boy Tata came to earth for his graduating report with his pet Qtee, through a thousand year's advantage beyond human technology, thinking that he will be capable of going all the way in this "prehistoric civilization".

While when he landed on the earth boy Hoye's house, his spacecraft was disassembled by this crazy model fan on earth…The unexpected alien roommate kept bringing all kinds of trouble as well as marvelous technology to Hoye. And his ordinary and boring summer holiday will be turned completely upside down by this alien boy!

Civilization from the remote Pu Nebula, miscellaneous variants of the detector, and the alien friend full of secrets…all this comes with basic science knowledge, grand view of the world and the universe, in a simple wish of the creative team that their works will not only please the children with fabulous images and hilarious plots, but also can inspire their curiosity and thirst for learning, guide their ways to get on with friends and family, and that's their way to create contents of real value.

(Source: dice.konnect.digital)
